title: Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You)
why_this_song: Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You) by Kelly Clarkson (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 24 times; first heard in: "What doesn't kill you makes you stronger"

Appears 14 times; first heard in: "What doesn't kill you makes you stronger"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger
Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone
What doesn't kill you makes a fighter
You know the bed feels warmer
You know I dream in color
And do the things I want

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "doesn't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "doesn't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stronger" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You know the bed feels warmer

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: What doesn't kill you makes a fighter
Doesn't mean I'm lonely when I'm alone

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You)" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You)"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Kelly Clarkson one question about "Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Kelly Clarkson sobre "Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You)", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You)" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Stronger (What Doesn't Kill You)" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
